productDisplayName: ASICS Men Gel Cumulus Running Grey Sports Shoes
description: asics' cushioning material, Solyte, now runs the length for increased bounce and comes to you in the form of the asics Gel-Cumulus. Hit your training goals as you build up your endurance and speed with the help of these shoes. Built for underpronators to mild overpronators, it's a great buy for all those looking for enhanced support. UpperSynthetic overlays provide lightweight, durable supportDiscrete independently placed eyelets to evenly distribute lace tension for an enhanced FitLace-ups for snug fitSynthetic laces for enhanced durability and easy maintenanceCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortMesh tongue for breathabilityBrand name on the tongue MidsoleSolyte midsole material is lighter than ASICS' standard EVA and SpEVA -its responsive nature delivers a supremely cushioned ride and makes it highly durablePHF (Personalized Heel Fit) creates a custom fit as the two layers of memory foam that line the collar mold to your heel.ComforDry insole offers anti-microbial properties for a drier, healthier environmentOutsoleI.G.S (Impact Guidance System) employs linked component to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike through toe-offRearfoot & forefoot Gel cushioning systems work together to better attenuate impacting shock and allow the foot to move fluidly throughout the gait cycleAHAR (ASICS High Abrasion Rubber) is known for its supreme durability and is strategically placed throughout high-wear areas of the outsole.DuraSponge forefoot outsole material is comprised of a blown AHAR rubber for superior cushioning and long-lasting wearGuidance Line vertical flex groove that decouples the tooling along the line of progression for maximum stride efficiencyshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
